rationale: Adding MongoDB::Regex wrapper object; API ergonomics improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
API ergonomics: adding clone() method for immutable objects; no spec involvement.
Deprecating mutable write concern/read preference; internal API design change, no spec rule violated.
Consistency between v0 and v1 of same driver on _id modification; no named spec rule violated.
Perl-specific op_char substitution feature interacting with Bulk API; no spec rule about custom operator characters.
Replacing legacy author email addresses in metadata and docs; purely administrative.
Replacing legacy author email addresses in metadata and docs; purely administrative.
CRUD spec implies modified_count should throw if unavailable (pre-2.6); adding has_modified_count to implement spec-required behavior.
Renaming 'is_safe' to 'is_acknowledged'; internal API terminology update, no spec rule about attribute naming.
GridFS spec requires empty files to be readable; driver incorrectly throws 'no chunks found' for empty files.
Rationalizing timeout handling; internal implementation refactor with no specific contradicted spec rule.
No standard across drivers for connection-string vs constructor precedence; Python mentioned as comparison; spec gap.
Spec requires both connectTimeoutMS and socketTimeoutMS; driver only supported 'timeout' as connectTimeoutMS.
Connection string spec requires warning on unknown keys; driver lacked this required behavior.
Connection string spec requires case-insensitive key parsing; driver was case-sensitive.
SDAM spec mandates monitoring sockets use connection timeout as socket timeout; driver violated this requirement.
Auth implementation predates finalized spec; authMechanismProperties in connection string has wrong form per spec.
Memory leak when inflating DateTime::Tiny; internal Perl resource management, no spec rule involved.
Fixing snapshot cursor API to accept argument; API ergonomics fix, no spec rule about snapshot argument handling.
Deprecating cursor globals slave_ok and timeout; API cleanup, no spec rule specifically violated.
Adding list_collections method; new feature addition, not a nonconformance fix.
remove() should return result document with count; driver always returned 1, deviating from documented behavior.
Adding public API for server status reporting; new feature addition, no spec nonconformance.
Perl-specific bug: undef serialized as empty string when using Tie::IxHash; implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule.
DBRef $db field optionality; DBRef is not a formal MongoDB spec area covered by UTF tests.
'Some drivers allow fields other than $ref/$id/$db' --- filed to align Perl behavior with other drivers.
Perl-specific bug: Tie::IxHash with _id causes duplicate fields in BSON; implementation bug, no spec rule about this.
Enforcing ordered document constraint for sort; API ergonomics improvement, no specific spec rule about hash ordering.
Compilation errors on OpenBSD and Solaris; build/platform compatibility, no spec involvement.
Max BSON size checks done against whole command rather than per-document; implementation bug, no clear specific spec rule cited.
SDAM spec defines topology type rules by seed count and replica set name; Perl violated these rules; Python/Ruby mentioned as compliant.
Performance complaint about v1 alpha vs v0; no spec rule about performance, internal implementation concern.
Optimizing insert_many internals; performance improvement, no spec behavior change.
Shared float variables issue in Perl threads; Perl-specific threading bug, no spec involvement.
Shared float serialized as string after threads::shared clone; Perl-specific threading bug, no spec involvement.
bson.c compile failure on Windows; build/platform issue, no spec involvement.
Adding read preference to parallel scan; new feature addition, insufficient detail to confirm spec nonconformance.
Adding read preference to aggregate; new feature, no description to confirm specific spec rule violated.
Bulk Write spec requires partial results returned with exception on network failure; driver suppressed partial results.
bson.c compile failure on Solaris; build/platform compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
Compile/link errors on Windows; build/platform issue, no spec involvement.
Install of RC2 fails on Windows/Ubuntu due to missing method; release packaging bug, no spec involvement.
Using constant-time hash comparison for auth; security hardening improvement, depends on DRIVERS-255 but no spec rule specifically violated.
Sanitize URI error messages for security; security fix, no spec rule about error message content.
User support question about missing find_one_and_update method; user error or version mismatch, no spec nonconformance.
Documentation improvement for replica set connection; docs change, no spec behavior involved.
Test suite fails when localhost is a replica set; test environment detection issue, not a spec nonconformance.
BSON tests fail on longdouble Perl build; test floating-point precision issue on unusual platform, not a spec deviation.
Feature request: preserve fractional seconds in DateTime; new API option, no spec rule about datetime precision.
OID constructor accepts invalid hex value without error; validation bug but no specific BSON spec rule about constructor validation.
